en-US.title: Territory: GPS Run Tracker
en-US.subtitle: Run. Claim. Defend Your Map.
en-US.description:
Territory is a GPS run tracker and fitness habit builder that gamifies your runs. Track runs, claim territory on the map, and compete with friends.

RUN TRACKING
• GPS run tracker with distance, pace, and route mapping
• Jogging and running workout tracker
• Personal records for 5K, 10K, half marathon and more

TERRITORY & GAMIFICATION
• Turn your running routes into claimable zones on the map
• Run loops to capture and defend territory
• Build your map and challenge friends
• Leaderboard and competitive streaks

HABIT BUILDING
• Weekly run goals to stay motivated
• Run reminders and streak tracker
• Level up from Scout to Elite

Privacy-focused. No ads. Made for runners who want to run, claim, and defend.
en-US.promoText: GPS run tracker. Claim territory. Build habits. Compete with friends.
